mapper.select: select * from payment_password_reset where user_id = #{userId} and reset_code = #{resetCode} and used = 0 and expire_time > now() order by create_time desc limit 1
mapper.delete: delete from payment_password_reset where expire_time < now() or used = 1
mapper.select: select * from payment_password_reset where user_id = #{userId} and used = 0 and expire_time > now() order by create_time desc limit 1
